prompt: Produce a recipe step infographic for cooking a Beef Wellington, that mimics the simple icon-with-text style of the reference process diagram.
prompt_refined: Generate a multi-step recipe infographic for cooking Beef Wellington, precisely mimicking the visual style and layout of image 1. The infographic should contain 7 sequential steps, each with a numbered circular icon, a simple line-art illustration, and a concise text description, replicating the format seen in image 1. Arrange the first six steps in two rows of three (steps 1-3 on the top row, steps 4-6 on the middle row), with step 7 as a larger, final illustration on the right, mirroring the exact spatial arrangement of image 1. The icons should utilize a minimal color palette similar to the blues, beige, and black outlines present in image 1. The steps to be illustrated are: 1. Searing beef tenderloin. 2. Preparing mushroom duxelles. 3. Wrapping beef in prosciutto or crepes. 4. Enclosing the wrapped beef in puff pastry. 5. Scoring the pastry and applying egg wash. 6. Baking the Beef Wellington. 7. A final image showing a sliced Beef Wellington ready for serving, accompanied by a caption such as 'Bon Appetit!' or 'Enjoy!'.
objects: Infographic layout with 7 steps, arranged as two rows of three (steps 1-6) and a larger, final illustration on the right (step 7), mirroring image 1's spatial arrangement.
Title: "HOW TO COOK BEEF WELLINGTON" at the top.
Line-art illustration for step 1: Searing beef tenderloin.
Line-art illustration for step 2: Preparing mushroom duxelles.
Line-art illustration for step 3: Wrapping beef in prosciutto or crepes.
Line-art illustration for step 4: Enclosing the wrapped beef in puff pastry.
Line-art illustration for step 5: Scoring the pastry and applying egg wash.
Line-art illustration for step 6: Baking the Beef Wellington.
Larger line-art illustration for step 7: Sliced Beef Wellington ready for serving.
